description: TWO STRESEMANN IS HIT FOR BUYING OPPOSING PAPER Leader Special Service BERLINThe parties defending the German republic were supplied with a first class sensation the other day when Foreign Minister Strese mann admitted in the reichstag that the national government six months ago had bought The Deutsche Allgemeine Zeitung one of the sharpest Nationalist papers in the countin Vorwaerts the organ of the Ger man Socialist party scores Strese mann for maintaining out of public funds a paper which fights the Lo carno and Thoiry policies of his government and which continually meddles in the internal politics of AlsaceLorraine thereby giving to Poincare and his friends the ma terial which sabotages the peace policies of Briand and Stresemann Attacks Russian Rule The Allgemeine Zeitung even after the national government had secretly taken it over several times attacked the Prussian government in which the Socialists hold the strongest positions Vorwaerts wants to know whether these at tacks were written with the con sent of the national government Furthermore it was revealed that the sale to the government was made without the knowledge of the papers editorial staff and other em ployes The paper was sold with all its living and dead
